calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2002 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2002 Set For Trial On Jun-10-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Robert G. Burton, Esq. 777-8682 for pltf & opposing party; Richard G. Grotch, Esq. 650/592-5400 for deft & moving party United Airlines, Inc.; Bonnie R. Cohen, Esq. 931-0928 for deft & moving party Orlando L. Clark, M.D.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to dismiss by Dr. Clark granted failure to serve timely request for trial de novo.
Motion for summary judgment by United Airlines re sexual battery granted. No triable issue of fact re offensive contact or intent see BAJI 756. Also claim barred by workmen's compensation coverage see Fretland vs.County of Humboldt 69Cal.App.4th 1478.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Prevailing party to prepare order.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Robert G. Burton, Esq. 777-8682 for pltf & opposing party; Richard G. Grotch, Esq. 650/592-5400 for deft & moving party United Airlines, Inc.; Bonnie R. Cohen, Esq. 931-0928 for deft & moving party Orlando L. Clark, M.D.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows:
Motion to dismiss by Dr. Clark granted failure to serve timely request for trial de novo.
Motion for summary judgment by United Airlines re sexual battery granted. No triable issue of fact re offensive contact or intent see BAJI 756. Also claim barred by workmen's compensation coverage see Fretland vs. County of Humboldt 69Cal.App.4th 1478.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Prevailing party to prepare order.
